title: Harvest time tracking column
excerpt: It would be great to have a Harvest time tracking column like in Asana. When you click on the column, a Harvest pop-up opens and you can track time. After entering your time, it will display in the column in Monday, so y…

posts.author: Crisp (Chris Peters)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have a Harvest time tracking column like in Asana. When you click on the column, a Harvest pop-up opens and you can track time. After entering your time, it will display in the column in Monday, so you can work with the entry in other columns.

Harvest Help Center

Asana — track time to Harvest

The Harvest + Asana integration allows you to track time to Harvest directly from your tasks in Asana. You can also import projects and people from Asana to Harvest, as described in Asana: Import p...

posts.author: Pray59 (Patti Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! Was there ever any update on this?
